segments.original_text: あれちょっとカムイの機動力だと

segments.text: It's pretty hard to catch a mistake on that Spin Wave recovery
segments.original_text: スピンウェイブによるライン回復にミスくっつけるのはなかなか難しいですかね

segments.text: In neutral, I want to approach with good spacing
segments.original_text: 立ち回りではとあざわでいきたいですね

full_text: Spin Wave... Yeah, with Corrin's mobility though it's pretty hard to catch a mistake on that Spin Wave recovery. In neutral, I want to approach with good spacing
